title: For-In Range
description: Iterate through a specific range of numbers using the for-in loop and the closed range operator.
problemStatement:
Count up! Write a `for-in` loop that iterates from `1` to `5` (inclusive) and prints each number.

**Requirement:** Use the `...` closed range operator.
hints: The operator `...` includes the end value, while `..<` excludes it.
